Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Yerin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is a disciple of the Sword Sage and follows the Path of the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin is a warrior with shredded black robes and blade-straight hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin has a network of scars from her wrist to her fingertips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's boundary is not a powerful one and does not take much energy to operate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin believes that when the time is right, a sacred artist must shed blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's master was an expert without peer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin intends to harvest her master's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin was born a Ruler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin Forged a flat shimmer in the air that looks like a sword hammered out of pure force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin wears white Heaven's Glory clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin can use sword madra to break scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin wears tattered black clothes and a stolen iron badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin is flying a rosy cloud toward the Ancestor's Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin uses the Endless Sword technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin fought a Remnant using her sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin has a steel limb on her back that looks like one of the six blades on the Sword Sage’s Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin possesses a gold badge with a simple picture of a sword in the center.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin wears a gold badge around her neck.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin is at the Iron stage and is not yet ten years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a Gold stage sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin's master was murdered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a legendary Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a teacher to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin was missing from the camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin is a skilled Enforcer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin is a Lowgold practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin was the strongest being in Sacred Valley by a long margin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin possesses a white blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin has a silver sword-arm on her back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin has a steel arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin wears a belt that is a construct forged from red madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin is capable of using Striker techniques and acting as an Enforcer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin is traveling with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin is a sacred artist with an extra limb due to her Gold status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin looked down and stared at Resh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin is the disciple of a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin's spirit is described as pure and clean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin wears a blood-red rope around her waist like a belt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin is of no clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin carries a sheathed sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin observes that the masked stranger is strong.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin can gather sword madra from her surroundings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin has crossed the threshold to Gold stage and possesses a shiny metal arm with a sword stuck on it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin was given space among the main sect in rooms reserved for honored guests of the Fishers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is associated with Fisher Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin has been spending her time with the Fishers hunting Remnants and sacred beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin possesses overwhelming offensive power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin wears a black sacred artist's robe provided by the Fishers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin possesses a bladed arm on her back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin drew her white sword against Kral.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is wearing a collar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is a miner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is questioning Eithan's identity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin protested that Lindon was not sturdy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin uses sword madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin possesses a Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin's foundation is described as flawless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is at the peak of Jade stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin's voice can be heard through the door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin looks at Lindon with pity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin is only halfway through pushing madra channels through her entire body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin fought almost without rest for a full night and most of the next day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan left Yerin to watch over Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin uses a twisted seashell binding to spray water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's Goldsign flashed when a Remnant attacked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin is a combatant running with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin used a wave of sword madra against Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin is present during the confrontation with Kral.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin has not risen from where she fell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin's body had no weight to it as she drifted on the breeze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin has high skill despite being outclassed in power by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin possesses a bladed Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin has a master who used to say that no Path is wide enough for two.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin has a spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin was once an Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin is present with Lindon and Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin practices cycling meditation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin has a silver limb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin is a Goldsign with stable madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin is a person who trains early in the morning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin is trying to get her Remnant to guide her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin's master is the Sword Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin's master was much stronger than an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin has red skin and scars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin has black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin wears tattered black clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin is the top-ranked student of the outer family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's Goldsign was quivering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin uses the Endless Sword through her Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is sixteen years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin groaned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin absorbed her master's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin uses cycling and breath focus to manage her frustration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is straining against the limits of Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin has a slight blockage in her soul caused by cycling within Blackflame aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin uses a cycling technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is Eithan's little sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin uses spears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin knelt before the Ruler Trial’s tablet with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin uses silver aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin possesses blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin advanced from Lowgold to Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's master is a Remnant consisting of silver power in her core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's technique is the Flowing Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's technique is an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's techniques on her Path are half a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's Goldsign is used for her Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's master is a sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's master is a parasite.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's master is a guest in her core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin uses Goldsigns in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin can use Ruler techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's core was emptied for the second time in one evening.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's spirit and body were aching with exhaustion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's spirit was likely weak after a battle on the main peak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin left Sacred Valley and went into the Desolate Wilds with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — A young Underlord had found Lindon and Yerin, adopting them.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin has skin covered by razor-thin scars and wears black robes that are sliced and tattered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin carries two silver blades and a sword buckled to her hip on a red belt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin's power is sharp, cold, and not fully formed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a girl that Suriel told Lindon to seek.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a reluctant host of a sealed Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is seeking the voice of the Sword Sage while cycling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin has achieved Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin wears her Blood Shadow as a belt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin is eighteen years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — There is a rumor that Yerin was the disciple of a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin helped prepare Lindon for the duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin previously told Lindon that Jai Long thinks of him like a Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin possesses a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin was found bloody and broken on the stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin has a Goldsign that may be out of her control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin cannot read.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin has blades on her shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin intends to go after those raising swords against Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is a sacred artist who has earned rewards from the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's master taught her the cost of sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin intends to join the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is not afraid of trials.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin entered the room where Lindon was working with constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin has been following Bai Rou for nearly two years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is a companion adopted by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is a person Lindon will be headed to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is a participant in the Highgold course.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin passed the Highgold application in first place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin's madra is rock-stable for a Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is an emissary of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Skysworn struggled onto his cloud, kneeling on it and flying over to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The parasite did not enter Yerin's core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's spirit is exhausted from trying to keep the Blood Shadow from taking over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's rage is stronger than her fear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin has most of her body down the stairs.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin was held in chains and shackles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin has two arms of Forged silver madra extending from her back that end in blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin's Goldsigns are blades made of Forged silver madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is made of living madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin passed through the jade doorway sword-first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin uses the Rippling Sword Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is a mass of blood madra that forms a copy of her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin would not leave Lindon behind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin attempted to reach a portal to save Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin has an empty core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin is meeting with the Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin taught Lindon principles of combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's Goldsigns were folded up over her shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's Path is the Path of the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's madra is dense enough to cross the barrier to Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is currently missing or separated from Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is mentioned by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin spent time running from dragons through the woods with Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin uses a sword to push herself up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin's arms feel a hundred times heavier than usual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin's skin on her right arm is red-and-black, twisted, and almost melted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has been apart from Yerin for a long time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin uses a Striker technique against the Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin uses her master's blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is a red Remnant copy of her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin embraced Lindon with a black-and-silver blur.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin pilots the Skysworn cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin can slash acidic madra from the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Goldsigns shine silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin uses three blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin is a character in the story.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin asked Lindon if he was going to kick Gwei between the legs and run.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin pulled her Goldsigns close to her back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin uses pulses of tightly controlled sword madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon promised the remaining Spirit Well water to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin can manifest six arms of sword madra from her back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's Goldsigns can be withdrawn into her back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin beat Lindon to reaching the end of Truegold by ten seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin has six Goldsign arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin is someone Lindon thinks would fight in this situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin wears Skysworn armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's skin is pale and her eyes are sunken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's fighting style involves seamless movement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin's lifeline is severely damaged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is being treated by Brightcrown healers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is speaking to someone about survival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is in a state of dying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin's advancement would involve her soulfire rebuilding her lifeline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin's goal is to become an Underlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon needs to save Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin stood with Lindon and Mercy wearing Skysworn armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin can veil her madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin activated the Endless Sword technique using all six of her Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin wears green armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin possesses soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin practices the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is someone Akura Mercy sought to save.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Damage to Yerin's lifeline is a minor inconvenience to a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is an Underlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is surrounded by life madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is defending herself from whips of green madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin was in danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's Goldsigns look like actual steel blades growing on metal arms from her shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's green armor is pitted and cracked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's hair has grown and now hangs into her eyes and past her shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin carried an armful of treasures out of the vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is present during the interaction with King Dakata.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is expected to be selected for the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin has eight arms.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is competing in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin possesses six gleaming sword-arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin uses Goldsigns that sweep like claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin's sword-aura can detonate into the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin uses the Shadow technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin is not an Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin can only feel madra rather than seeing without her eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin's master almost married the Sage of the Frozen Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin communicates with Lindon via a jewel-construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin was adopted into the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin uses a blindfold to focus her perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin possesses a purple crystalline construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's construct uses dream and shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin was once a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin has perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin fought Sopharanatoth in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon wishes he were standing with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's sword-aura is effective at annihilating large ranks of weaker enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin used the Endless Sword to cover Naru Saeya.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is a factor in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin stands shoulder-to-shoulder with Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is the only person physically stronger than Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin suspects her heightened awareness may be due to the Sword Sage's Remnant or her evolving spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin blindfolded herself during a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin used Goldsigns to make a cage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin is a sword artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin used sword-aura to knock aside an attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin wears a sacred artist's robe that is a duplicate of the one Lindon first saw her in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin has advanced to the Underlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin possesses Diamond Veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is furious with Northstrider for pitting her and Lindon against each other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin has a Blood Shadow that is a spiritual copy of her in shades of crimson.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin uses a red copy to observe her opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin fights alongside her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin's body is trembling with effort during the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow has a version of the Final Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin won a fight against Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is often mobbed by strangers.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin is a person whom Timaias Adama considers a student or subordinate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin is someone who left with Adama.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin is Adama's apprentice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin has a parasite in her soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin is a Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin is on the same level as an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin is a potential future Sage of the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a fighter associated with Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is still in the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin uses a gem-like dream tablet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin looked concerned while Lindon spoke to Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin is a companion of Lindon and Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin watched the fight from the Akura audience platform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin and Mercy were announced to be fighting each other, though it was a lie.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin is scheduled for a month of training with a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin wears formal layers of black, violet, and silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin has similar powers to Blacksword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin is watching the Uncrowned matches with Lindon and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin wears a standard black uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin closed her eyes as nine-colored light swirled around her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Winter Sage chose Yerin as a pupil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin gathered with Mercy and Eithan at the end of the cloudship dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin has previously trained to sense sword aura in the freezing cold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin is staying in a network of wooden huts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's outer robe was being shredded by the icy wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's Forger technique is brittle and weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin uses the Hidden Sword technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's foundation is adequate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin uses spiritual sense to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin is the heir to the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Meira was responsible for almost killing Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan can funnel advancement resources to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin fought a demon in a snowy village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is aware of a Monarch-killing weapon being at stake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin's madra makes her sword glow silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon wants to see Yerin again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is considered one of the most eligible young women in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin hoped Eithan had permission for his actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin gave Mercy encouragement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon had a battle with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin is the only one left in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's spirits lifted when the Ninecloud Soul manifested.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin uses her sword and calming breaths to keep her madra moving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin senses the flow of sword madra and her dormant Blood Shadow within herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's spirit trembled and her core drained while controlling the Frozen Blade technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin was announced the winner by the Ninecloud Soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin is a potential participant in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin fell toward Lindon with a raised sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin is at the Frozen Blade school.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin decoded the instructions to absorb a power into her core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin is present during the discussion of the final gift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin interrupted the Blood Sage and provoked him with insults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin sees mirror images of herself from her own memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin saw her own look of serenity from the outside as she opened her eyes facing Calan Archer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin's core was full but inactive while the Madra Engine settled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin cycled sword aura amid a forest of blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin was demanding that Charity go get them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is a character who uses blood aura and has a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin uses an Enforcer technique on her sword blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is capable of gathering madra and aura into her sword to create silver-white energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin closed the gap with Yan Shoumei after Crusher tossed Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin is fighting to ensure the safety of Lindon, Eithan, and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin is on the path to becoming a Sword Sage once she reaches Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin does not back down from the person speaking to her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin was one of the top two fighters in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin is wary of the way the Shadow looks at Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin was supposed to fight Yan Shoumei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin won a recent competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Blood Shadow tried to do something to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Yerin's Overlord revelation was 'I am not him.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Yerin is an Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin is going into battle against Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Eithan discussed the possibility of a copy of Yerin being Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin and Ruby marched down tunnels to a waiting room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin can use the Blood Sage’s technique to send power to her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin has the mental enhancement from the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin uses a Steelborn Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin slammed her blade into Sophara’s.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin was an Underlord in the past.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin was decapitated by Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin uses the Flowing Sword technique empowered by soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin has been haunted by nightmares since she was a little girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin uses red madra and silver madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin cycles madra into her Flowing Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin uses the Moonlight Bridge to appear behind Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Dross reported that Yerin won the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin used the Final Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin's technique produced red-white light that blasted through the image of the golden dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin might see Sophara saving Akura Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin was watching Malice fight the Dragon King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin intended to use Penance and the Moonlight Bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin appeared in a white glow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin is pinned in place by the Heart and Winter Sages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin was questioning the Sages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin is a character who recognizes the owner of the second cloudship.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin has two metallic red sword-arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin has a crimson-tinted sword-arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin possesses immense strength that can warp reality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin's perception is extremely powerful.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin's power is a dimension higher than a normal Lord's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin has ruby eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin uses a black-bladed sword from her void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin and Ruby have merged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin's body has partially fused with her spirit since she merged with her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin is a character whose master dove into the Valley with eyes open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin is present in the scene.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin stated she was not at her peak but was not made of glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin used Moonlight Bridge to travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin was attacked by five streaks of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin is the girl who took Lindon away from Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin protected and fought for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin was sitting with Mercy and Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin is someone Lindon plans to visit the Wei clan with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin's spirit is described as being tangled with her body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin is a character mentioned by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin holds Lindon's left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin has metallic crimson Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is in charge of Lindon and Teris.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin has red eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin watches the evacuation from Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin uses the Moonlight Bridge technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin's presence keeps her from throwing herself at the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is observing a rust-colored mountain stained with gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is at the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is standing on the bough of a giant tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin once ran from the school's pursuers in the wild territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin escaped on her own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin dropped down through the hatch in the ceiling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin possesses the Broken Crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin's Goldsigns were moving erratically.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin describes Lindon as someone who does not give up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin states that Lindon would not leave her alone if her core popped and she was no better than a Copper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin's eyes can glow red like scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's Divine Treasure failed to recover in time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin felt useless after losing her spine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin mentioned having two minds in her head for a moment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin is an outsider to Lindon's home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin was caught by the tail of the Wandering Titan in a vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin dashed out of a blue-edged crack in space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin focused the Final Sword through her blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Dreadgod moved toward Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's body was covered in veins of bright red madra that replaced broken flesh.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is present and questioning the anchor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Malice can feel Yerin's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon brought Yerin to the Sword Sage’s void space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin paused at the entrance of the Tomb where she had once fought her master's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin is playing a game of darts with sharpened blades of grass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin is considered a hero of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin possesses dream techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin eats eel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin is located in Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin drew her black sword as Ziel entered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin leaped with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin used a wave of razor-sharp madra against the Tomb Hydra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin cycled her last elixir and focused on the layer of red aura around her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin's sword, robes, and most of her hair are black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin's eyes, Goldsigns, and one lock of her hair shine red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin uses the Netherclaw technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin was not slowed down by the tridents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin was pinned to the wall by dense water madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin was imprisoned inside a water technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin was being attacked by spirits that had no physical bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin can trade an attack or two with Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin winced at Lindon's state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin is Mercy's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin sat next to Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos spoke from Yerin’s shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is part of Lindon's group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin has the blood aspect of her power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is a character who emerged from the Nethergate with Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Yerin walked up to the Nethergate with Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin questioned Lindon about what happened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin sat down on Lindon's left side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin expressed frustration at Eithan for letting her think they were catching up to him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin is present during the encounter with the Abidan.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a person for whom an echo could be created.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a person Lindon intends to call.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin appeared in a flash of white light on the back of a ship floating on the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin possesses a black blade sword named Netherclaw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin is a defective Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin is one of the six beings threatened by the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin is a character for whom Lindon is creating a complex construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin intends to strip Redmoon Hall down to their bones once she learns what she can.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Dross mentions Yerin in conversation with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin possesses a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin is aboard a vessel belonging to Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin and Lindon are allies to Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin is mentioned by Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin's parents were killed by Blood Shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin is an Overlord Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin's body and spirit are closer to perfect harmony than any other Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin uses blood madra to heal herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin has a soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin can translate the squeaks of Riverseed and possesses a soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin is an associate of Lindon and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin has a relationship with a Blood Shadow that will become Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is an apprentice of Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is capable of fighting Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is a Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin uses a hunger spear in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin was passed by the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin collects natural treasures from her master's belongings and hunts them down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin is pushing for advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's vital aura is crimson.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin uses a void key to strike a deal with the Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin fought side-by-side with the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin possesses scarlet Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin has a red streak of hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin has a soul oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin asks why the Monarchs and Dreadgods are after them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is a person who plans to ascend one day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon felt Yerin’s madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin is waiting for Lindon at the former site of the Heaven’s Glory School, just outside the Ancestor’s Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin can pluck memories from the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin can vanish in a flash of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin waited for memory constructs to arrange themselves around her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin is at the entrance to the Soulforge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin possesses six Goldsigns and one Archlord blade.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is concerned about Mercy's condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin is a character who can explain things using 'Sage' logic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin possesses a Heart’s Gem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin appears next to Lindon in a flash of white light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has his arm around Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin was the only one besides Lindon still standing during the test.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon and Yerin are the reasons others like Little Blue or Mercy might be following them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin was experiencing time dilation relative to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin uses Forged earth madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin has achieved a Herald state early.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Min Shuei was romantically involved with Yerin's master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin sent a message through the Dreamway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin was in her cycling room within Ghostwind Hall gathering blood and sword aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is a character who can activate Paths of Heaven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is a character who expresses jealousy toward Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin hovered in front of the cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin's Moonlight Bridge is a Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin uses the Phoenix Song technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is referred to as the Uncrowned Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin flooded her sword with madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin went after Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin can push through advancement realms with sheer stubbornness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon tells Mercy and Ziel to find Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin shines like a crimson star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin can emit scarlet fury that outshines the sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin can expand her spirit to the blood aura around her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin used her blade to kill Yushi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin escaped by cutting through the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin felt the battle of the Weeping Dragon on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan once called Yerin 'Yerin Arelius'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin's Phoenix Song can strip Remnants of their will, memories, and madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin's heart tightens like a bowstring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin is on her way to the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin is battling through a hostile storm and lightning-dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin attempted to activate her Moonlight Bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin has already shot off on her own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is a person Orthos has dealt with previously.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is flying toward the combat area at high speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin feels arrogant and intends to execute the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin moves toward the Weeping Dragon like a silver-and-red comet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin can float using only her will without manipulating wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin possesses twin Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin stole power from a Sage and a Herald to keep herself going.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Dragon was focused on Yerin, attacking her with lightning and claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin was covered in burns, cuts, and bruises.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon wants to find material to make Yerin a real sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's madra is not compatible with the Weeping Dragon's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Ozriel hoped to see Yerin ascend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin was wrapped in many bandages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin is one of Lindon's flunkies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin is mentioned in relation to Mercy's training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin was in Ghostwind Hall meditating on the eighth Path of Heaven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin's eyes are like Fury's and they blaze red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin cycled her madra to its limit to remain standing under Malice's authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin's sword blazed with red-and-silver madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin's Goldsigns used a Flowing Sword Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin pushed her Steelborn Iron body to its limits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin wants to make her a sword artist in five seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin uses a hunger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The Death Icon is raising Yerin to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin caught Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin is restless and has been working on Eithan's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin has good insight into the advancement to Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Yerin uses aura control to contain the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Yerin provides support to Emriss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Yerin was keeping pace with Lindon as he flew through a gap between the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Reigan Shen used Yerin's Moonlight Bridge to redirect her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Yerin uses black-and-white Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Yerin's cuts carry echoes of death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Yerin's ascension was not as smooth as Fury's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Yerin used her Goldsign to cut a hole in the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Yerin is one of the potential Executors and has red eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Yerin had warned Larian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Yerin is not on the other side of the rift Lindon opened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon worried that Yerin might have been jailed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Yerin wears black armor.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is capable of Forging the claw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin is sent to solve problems that can be killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin is mentioned as someone who would have helped kill the Fiend quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon wishes he could send a message to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is mentioned by Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin has advanced to Overlady Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin leaned her elbow on Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is part of the group traveling through the Way with Eithan and Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin imagined her fragment as a place for life to flourish and for the creatures to live and spread.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin suggested the name Refuge for the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin and Lindon emerged from a Way-portal with Abidan warnings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is visiting her birthplace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin is known as the Death Monarch Yerin Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin remarked that the town felt like home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin has a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin possesses Goldsigns.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
